evals.expected_output: The skill triggers and runs the full 6-phase webtoon production pipeline with phase-rebuilt agent teams.
assertions: The response builds phase teams (research → scenario → visual → assembly) with TeamCreate/TeamDelete
The research phase gathers web data via the scrapling skill
The output targets a vertical-scroll viewer (index.html) with in-image baked bubbles

evals.expected_output: Phase 0 detects an existing _workspace/, reuses world/style/continuity, and regenerates only from the episode stage onward.
assertions: The response reuses 02_story, style-bible, character-sheets, refs/, and continuity.md
The response does NOT re-render reference sheets
The response increments the episode number

evals.expected_output: A partial visual re-run re-renders and re-validates only panel 23, then re-assembles.
assertions: The response re-runs only the visual phase for panel 23 (prompt-smith + the panel-artist + panel-validator)
The response re-assembles the viewer after the re-render
The response does not re-run research or scenario phases

evals.expected_output: A partial scenario re-run (twist-master, script-editor) plus re-running affected downstream phases.
assertions: The response re-runs the scenario team's twist-master and script-editor
The response re-runs affected downstream stages (shotlist → render → assemble)
The response preserves prior artifacts under _workspace/

evals.expected_output: Runs the research team only, gathering platform rankings and reader reactions via scrapling into trend-brief.md.
assertions: The response runs the 5-member research team
Web extraction routes through the scrapling skill with source URL + observation date per claim
The response synthesizes one actionable trend-brief.md

evals.expected_output: The skill does NOT trigger; this is a recommendation/critique request answered directly.
assertions: The response does not build agent teams or run the production pipeline
The response answers the recommendation directly
